programmes.show_description: ...Skill. A million dollars' worth of timber could be stranded unless Craig works out a plan. Brent is weeks behind in logging and narrowly avoids disaster while uprooting a giant tree.
In Townsville, Queensland, long-distance trucker Peter is getting set for a cross-country haul. He has to move a load of mixed freight through bush, farmland and desert to Darwin.
A rolled over tipper truck on a busy road has the Crouch crew scrambling. A vandalised motorhome with broken steering needs saving from a driveway.
Recovery ops are dispatched to a toppled trailer and tractor unit on the busy A1. And in Walsall Snods deals with a car is on the brink of tumbling into a canal lock!
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one!
Action-packed observational documentary series with Jamie Theakston. The traffic cops hunt down burglars, drug dealers, petrol bikers and thieves.
An armed drink-driver leads the interceptors through a graveyard. A man is given a lesson in road safety after attempting to use a moped as a minibus.
Ange stands up to a couple of heavyweights and Craig is unimpressed by one man's feeble attempt to disguise his identity.
Western starring Ray Milland and Hedy Lamarr. A group of veterans working as copper miners hire a sharpshooter to help them fend off a local gang. (1950)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Western starring Ray Milland and Hedy Lamarr. A group of veterans working as copper miners hire a sharpshooter to help them fend off a local gang. (1950)
Thoughtful western starring Charlton Heston and Joan Hackett. A middle-aged cowhand runs into a gang of thieves and a beautiful woman as he searches for work. (1968)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Thoughtful western starring Charlton Heston and Joan Hackett. A middle-aged cowhand runs into a gang of thieves and a beautiful woman as he searches for work. (1968)
At Glasson Docks, a cargo ship has arrived at high tide. Haulier Lee is part of a convoy of trucks who are helping empty the hold before the tide goes back out and beaches the boat.
Action-packed observational documentary series with Jamie Theakston. York's traffic cops deal with a distressing incident in which a pregnant woman has been knocked off her bike.
First up in this action-packed episode, after a tram-stop robbery in Bulwell, the Interceptors are on the hunt for two suspects allegedly armed with a gun.
This episode opens in epic style with a 20-mile cross border pursuit. The suspect heads onto the M1 motorway, weaving all over the shop, at over 120 miles per hour.
Northumbria Police face a daily battle with dangerous and illegal motorbike use. In Newcastle, cops pursue - by car and chopper - a group riding off-road.
Frontline officers confront an electric scooter rider who collided with a car. Next, we plunge into the chaos in the city centre, where one fight begins after another ends.
A suspect in possession of a stolen truck leads everyone on a chase through some bumpy terrain. Gas station employees call police when they spot a couple asleep at the pump.
A personalised keychain casts doubt on a man's story. A cyclist tosses something as soon as deputies arrive. A laid-back driver underestimates what is in his car by a few bin bags.
An injured FBI agent appears to be possessed by a criminal he shot, and Scully herself is in danger.
The Glovers race to get their wood and machines off Erie Mountain before government road restrictions shut them down for spring. Craig's crew rush to get stranded wood off the landing.
Matt Adams rides a volatile load into a world of trouble with a bull on board. The Kendalls share a family trucking experience and another haul carries a sting...
The heat is on for Dean and Daniel after a garage fire leaves 11 vehicles in need of removal. Most of the vehicles are complete write-offs so the duo must get these burnouts out.
Near the Scottish border, a massive articulated truck has tumbled down a steep slope and toppled on to its side and in the Midlands a lorry has caught fire on the busy A1.

This episode hits the ground running as the interceptors pull over a driver, who casually steps out of the car, before taking off like a shot.
Police enter a 'house of horrors' seeking a man on the run. Plus, an epic 45-mile pursuit.
Cops seek a car on clone plates that has racked up nearly 600 fines. PC Leslie pulls over a driver in a car that's not his, with no insurance and no licence.
PC Tommy Wade is forced to ram a car to a stop - but why is the driver so desperate to get away from the cops? And police race to a serious two-car collision.
A cop pursues a vehicle after a report of a cloned car with a balaclava-wearing driver. In Byker, PCs witness what looks like a drug deal through a car window.
Police tackle a drink driver at 8am, an uninsured pizza delivery man, and a reckless driver wanting a selfie despite having no licence or insurance.
Northumbria Police face a daily battle with dangerous and illegal motorbike use. In Newcastle, cops pursue - by car and chopper - a group riding off-road.
The evil Clanton gang kills Marshal Wyatt Earp's brother after he saves Doc Holliday, a gambler, from them. He and Doc then go on a mission to take revenge.

Military drama in which a former US marine and prisoner of war attempts to find a POW camp and liberate the prisoners to prove that soldiers are still being held captive. (1984)

Mulder suspects supernatural involvement in two identical murders committed at exactly the same time on different coasts.
